title: Add 1.9105 BPB submission (M3 Pro Optimized)
author: swangai7178

data.description: Forced fans to 4200+ RPM to maintain performance and prevent thermal throttling on Apple Silicon hardware
Manual cache clearing to handle the 12-layer depth on 18GB unified memory

novel_contributions: Optimized for Apple MacBook Pro M3 Pro hardware
Used Muon optimizer for rapid convergence on Apple Silicon
Forced fans to 4200+ RPM to avoid thermal throttling
Manual cache clearing to fit a 12-layer model within 18GB unified memory
